TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Tufuga_Efi, title = Tufuga_Efi, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tufuga_Efi} }

S.FORM: Tufuga Efi Mntucing hngkawas 1938 idas 3 jiyax 1 ka Tufuga Efi ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Samoa ta sayang o kiya ka Tufuga Efi, pnaah hngkawas 2007 idas 5 jiyax 11 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: tu*uga ə*i mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * ka tu*uga ə*i ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan samoa ta sajaŋ o kija ka tu*uga ə*i, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: Tufuga Efi Mntucing hngkawas 1938 idas 3 jiyax 1 ka Tufuga Efi ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Samoa ta sayang o kiya ka Tufuga Efi, pnaah hngkawas 2007 idas 5 jiyax 11 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: tu*uga ə*i mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * ka tu*uga ə*i ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan samoa ta sajaŋ o kija ka tu*uga ə*i, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
